steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The sentence describes the narrator arriving and placing belongings down: 'drop my backpack' is parallel to 'set my guitar case against a wall.' The question asks which word is closest in meaning to 'drop' in this context.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — Forget about: means to leave something behind unintentionally — unrelated to the act of placing objects down. ✗
  • Choice B — Put down: directly matches the literal meaning of placing something down, parallel to 'set.' ✓
  • Choice C — Unbolt: describes unfastening — irrelevant to this context. ✗
  • Choice D — Empty: describes removing contents, not placing the bag itself down. ✗
That confirms B is correct.
